AddressInfo.Title: Engen 1-Stop (Mooi rivier)
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Driving on the R103, turn-off into the road leading to the Engen gas station. Drive past the biltong shop, the charge point is located on the side of the building next to the entryway with the Quickshop logo..
